title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 18, 2024
summary: January 18, 2024: The sea ice has continued to increase , but at a much lesser rate of 0.81% (from last week’s growth rate of 3.38%), from the level on 01/11/2024 of 13.920 M km 2 to 14.034 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air...
